description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and large, grid-like windows dominating the upper floor. The facade is primarily black with white window frames, and the ground level includes a stone-textured base and a recessed entryway. A smaller, attached structure with a brick exterior sits adjacent to the main building, separated by a narrow walkway and flanked by tall, conical trees. The property is bordered by sidewalks and includes urban elements such as a crosswalk, parked vehicles, and street trees. The main entrance is set back from the street, partially obscured by landscaping and a parked orange car. The overall appearance is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a black-and-white facade, accompanied by a smaller brick structure and urban landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main black-and-white house, large windows, recessed entry, street trees, and vehicles on the road.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the brick structure, rooftop details, and landscaping with conical trees.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the stone-textured base, white rear facade, and the separation between the main house and the brick structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the black side wall, rooftop, and blue van parked along the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, flanked by landscaping and partially shielded by a parked car.
